title: Ericoides niveum

This family consists of tropical plants commonly known as African violets and gloxinia. Ericoides niveum is further classified into the genus Ericoides, which is a small group of flowering plants. The classification of Ericoides niveum is also supported by its physical characteristics, such as its white flowers and growth habit.
